title: Rigorous proof
prompt: Prove or disprove: for every positive integer n, there exists a multiple of n whose decimal representation uses only the digits 0 and 1. Give a rigorous proof and examples for n = 7, 13, 37, and 999.

title: Code debugging
prompt: A React component fetches data in useEffect and sometimes renders stale results after the user changes filters quickly. Explain the likely race condition, then provide a robust TypeScript implementation that cancels or ignores stale requests.

title: Planning synthesis
prompt: Design a local-first benchmarking app for comparing LLMs. Include data schema, UI states, retry behavior, result aggregation, and how to avoid biased measurements. Be concrete and structured.

title: Constrained math
prompt: Find all integer triples (a, b, c) with 1 <= a, b, c <= 500 such that a^3 + b^3 = c^3 + 42. Show your reasoning and explain how you checked the search space.
